settings.heading: Discover Ecological Landscape Projects
settings.subheading: We specialize in native habitat, natural resource enhancement, stormwater management, edible landscapes, and climate resilience.

settings.title: Explore Our Services
settings.text:
Landscape Design & Build — Specializing in native habitat, natural resource enhancement, stormwater management, edible landscapes, and climate resilience.

Installation — Resilient landscapes including gathering areas, patios, pathways, raised beds, rain gardens, and living walls.

Plant Orders & Contract Growing — Nursery services and contract growing for your project, large or small.

Ecological Consulting — Long-term project oversight and tailored guidance for your land.

settings.heading: Approach with Curiosity
settings.text: We begin with on-site consultations and observation-based work. Every landscape tells a story — we listen first. Our process is rooted in understanding the unique ecology of your site before we ever put pen to paper.

settings.heading: Collaboration is Central
settings.text: We bring together diverse perspectives and community-led design processes. Great landscapes emerge from partnership — between people, plants, and place. We believe the best ecological outcomes come from working together.

settings.title: Available This Season
settings.description: Hand-picked from our current inventory — all plants ready to go home with you.

settings.title: Plans are Dynamic
settings.text: Nature is never static, and neither are the ecosystems we are a part of. We design with the understanding that landscapes shift and evolve over time — adaptive design responding to climate change, prioritizing biodiversity, and growing with your land for the long haul.
